title: Modded Omelet - Modern Spawn Eggs
description: Modded Omelet is a resource pack made to not only backport the new spawn egg textures of 1.21.5 to older versions, but also adapt the spawn eggs of mods to match this new style.
body:
All Modded Omelet does is backport the new style of spawn eggs as of 1.21.5 to older versions while also offering mod support.


Join my discord server for updates and feedback at https://discord.com/invite/XBYfv2ttUw

Save 25% off your first month with Bisect Hosting using the code below! [Click here to go to Bisect!](https://bisecthosting.com/L200)
![Use the code L200 for 25% off your first month at Bisect Hosting!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/0563f08e-bec3-4acc-9f07-d8b97c59b488.webp)

The following 204 mods are currently supported by Modded Omelet as of version 1.6.2:

Ad Astra, Adventurez, Aether: Redux, Alex's Caves, Alex's Caves: Stuff & Torpedoes, Alex's Mobs, Ancient Aether, Ancient Golems, Aquaculture 2, Aquamirae, Aquatic Frontiers, Aquatica_, Ars Nouveau,
